body.processed:
Witness the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth during this 7-day safari through Tanzania's Serengeti National Park and Ngorongoro Crater. Expert naturalist guides ensure you see the Big Five and learn about the complex ecosystems that support this incredible biodiversity.

Day-by-Day Itinerary

  • Day 1: Arrive in Arusha, welcome dinner
  • Day 2: Drive to Tarangire National Park, afternoon game drive
  • Day 3-4: Serengeti National Park, full-day game drives
  • Day 5: Serengeti to Ngorongoro Conservation Area
  • Day 6: Ngorongoro Crater floor exploration
  • Day 7: Departure from Arusha
body.summary: Witness the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth during this 7-day safari through Tanzania's Serengeti National Park and Ngorongoro Crater. Expert naturalist guides ensure you see the Big Five and lea

image.alt: Elephants walking across the Serengeti plains at sunset

body.processed:
Trek one of the world's most iconic mountain circuits through diverse landscapes from subtropical forests to high-altitude desert. Cross the Thorong La Pass at 5,416 meters and experience the warmth of Nepali mountain hospitality at teahouses along the way.

Trek Highlights

  • Days 1-4: Ascend through lush rhododendron forests and terraced rice paddies
  • Days 5-8: High-altitude villages and Tibetan Buddhist monasteries
  • Day 9: Cross Thorong La Pass (5,416m)
  • Days 10-12: Descend through Muktinath and Jomsom to Pokhara

image.alt: Hikers on a mountain trail with Himalayan peaks in the background

body.processed:
Explore the incredible biodiversity of Costa Rica on this action-packed 9-day adventure. From cloud forests to volcanic hot springs, and from howler monkeys to quetzals, this tour showcases the best of Central America's ecological wonderland.

Itinerary

  • Days 1-2: San Jose to Arenal Volcano, hot springs and hanging bridges
  • Days 3-4: Monteverde Cloud Forest, canopy zip-line tour
  • Days 5-6: Manuel Antonio National Park, snorkeling and beach
  • Days 7-8: Tortuguero canals by boat, sea turtle nesting
  • Day 9: Return to San Jose and departure
body.summary: Explore the incredible biodiversity of Costa Rica on this action-packed 9-day adventure. From cloud forests to volcanic hot springs, and from howler monkeys to quetzals, this tour showcases the best o

image.alt: Lush green rainforest canopy in Costa Rica

body.processed:
Chase the aurora borealis across Iceland's dramatic landscapes on this 6-day photography-focused tour. Our expert photography guide will help you capture stunning images of the Northern Lights, glaciers, waterfalls, and volcanic terrain.

Tour Highlights

  • Day 1: Reykjavik orientation, camera setup workshop
  • Day 2: Golden Circle - Thingvellir, Geysir, Gullfoss
  • Day 3: South Coast waterfalls and black sand beaches
  • Day 4: Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
  • Day 5: Snaefellsnes Peninsula landscapes
  • Day 6: Final Northern Lights chase and departure
